video_info.title: UFC Freedom 250 - Topuria vs Gaethje
video_info.shortDescription: The Octagon sits ready on the historic South Lawn of the White House in Washington, D.C, as Ilia Topuria and Justin Gaethje step toward each other for the most explosive lightweight title unification bout in UFC history. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.episodeTitle: UFC Freedom 250 - Topuria vs Gaethje - 15 Jun 2026

video_info.title: Talent TV Cup
video_info.shortDescription: India A face Sri Lanka A in the Talent TV Cup at the Rangiri Dambulla International Stadium, Sri Lanka. Riding high after a win, the hosts will look to keep the momentum going, while India’s young brigade aim to bounce back from their previous loss. With pride and crucial points on the line, expect a gripping contest between two sides brimming with emerging talent. Find out as we bring you all the action from this Sri Lanka A vs India A fixture, LIVE on Sony LIV.
